chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 174 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.790/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Altaf Hussain Hisbani, Advocate for Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Aajiz Hussain Solangi, Advocate files vakalatnama and statement along with certain documents, whereas, statement has been filed by respondent No.2, same are taken on record. Since the case has been challaned before the competent Court of law, therefore, this Court has no jurisdiction to entertain this petition, in view of the dictum laid down by Honourable Supreme Court in the case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment Lahore and others vs. Muhammad Akram Khan (PLD 2013 Supreme Court 401) where it has been held that after taking of cognizance of a case by a trial Court the FIR registered in that case cannot be quashed and the fate of the case and of the accused persons challaned therein is to be determined by the trial Court itself. Under these circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
